etymology.interpretation: The character ๅญฐ (shรบ, "cooked; ripe") is a phono-semantic compound where the phonetic part ๐ฆซ provided the sound and ไธฎ provided meaning. Over time, these components became corrupted in appearance, leading to the modern form with ไบซ and ไธธ.
